info.name: 🏛️ COMPLETE Helwan Club System - ALL APIs
info.description:
🔥 COMPREHENSIVE POSTMAN COLLECTION - ALL 200+ ENDPOINTS

✅ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
- Authentication (Login, Change Credentials, Get User Profile)
- Staff Management (CRUD, Privileges, Privilege Packages)
- Member Management (CRUD, Status, Documents, Cards)
- Member Types & Memberships
- Sports Management
- Team Members
- Complete Registration System (All Member Types)
- Faculties & Professions
- Media Gallery
- Advertisements
- Audit Logs
- Tasks & System

📊 STATISTICS:
- Total Endpoints: 200+
- Total API Routes: 15
- Privilege-Based: 100+
- Public Endpoints: 10+
- Authentication: JWT Bearer Token

🚀 HOW TO USE:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Set baseUrl variable: http://localhost:3000
3. Login to get JWT token
4. Token will auto-save to {{token}} variable
5. All authenticated requests ready to use

📚 ORGANIZATION:
- 14 main categories
- Grouped by functionality
- Ready-to-use examples
- Complete documentation

Version: 3.0
Date: 2026-02-20
Author: Helwan Club Development Team

request.description:
Login with email and password
- ADMIN/EXECUTIVE_MANAGER: Use email + password
- Regular Staff: Use national_id + password
- Returns: JWT token (auto-saves to {{token}})
Change email and password (first login only)
